question: How to care the throttle-cable of the boat?
content: For throttle-cable care, apply water-resistant grease to the throttle-cable inner wires at the APS pulley wheel. The figure identifies the pulley-wheel area where the inner wires are greased.<PIC>
ret: "For throttle-cable care, apply water-resistant grease to the throttle-cable inner wires at the APS pulley wheel. The figure identifies the pulley-wheel area where the inner wires are greased.<PIC>",["Manual09_263"]
notes: Answered from the Yamaha 210FSH lubrication grease-points section; included the adjacent APS pulley-wheel figure because it identifies the greasing location.
